items.label: ModCase: Check precedent
items.description: Pick a rule/reason and see how the team handled similar past decisions.

items.label: ModCase: Record correction
items.description: Manually store a privacy-conscious precedent record without taking action on Reddit.

items.label: ModCase: Sync rules
items.description: Import subreddit rules into the controlled ModCase reason-label map.

items.label: ModCase: Audit snapshot
items.description: Show recent indexed decision buckets for this install.

items.label: ModCase: Rule trends
items.description: Show aggregate remove/approve trends by content type and controlled reason.

items.label: ModCase: Rule health
items.description: Summarize settled, leaning, contested, limited, and unknown-reason areas.

items.label: ModCase: Contested rules
items.description: Show reason buckets where recent team precedent is split or only weakly leaning.

items.label: ModCase: Second review
items.description: Show ambiguous aggregate buckets that may deserve another moderator read.

items.label: ModCase: Rule drift
items.description: Show rule areas where recent outcomes differ from older recent outcomes.

items.label: ModCase: Constitution
items.description: Generate a living summary of how this community usually moderates.

items.label: ModCase: Export report
items.description: Show a copyable privacy-conscious aggregate decision report.

items.label: ModCase: Transparency summary
items.description: Generate a shareable aggregate moderation summary for the community.

items.label: ModCase: Unknown cleanup
items.description: Remap recent Unknown / Unmapped precedent into a controlled reason bucket.

items.label: ModCase: Training mode
items.description: Practice against a past precedent example and reveal the team decision.

items.label: ModCase: Settings
items.description: Set retention and lookup-history limits for this subreddit install.

items.label: ModCase: Seed demo data
items.description: Populate this install with demo history for testing and judging.

items.label: ModCase: Debug log count
items.description: Show how many raw ModAction payloads were captured for verification.
